securedType.description: Specifies the type of secured debt product.

assetBacked.description: Specifies the type of Asset Backed Security.

collateralizedObligation.description: Specifies the type of Collateralized Obligation.

coveredBond.description: Specifies the type of Covered Bond.

propertyType.description: Specifies the type of property when the security is linked to a property asset.
